text:
The charts spinning on the markets page for the last 30 minutes—we'll get this sorted. A few quick things:

What app version are you on (check Settings), and does the issue happen on the web app at novig.com as well? If the web version works, that's a useful workaround while we investigate.

I'm looping in engineering with your report. Once I hear back on the version and whether web is affected, I'll follow up.

Novig Support
